name: mobile-design-system
description: Token-based mobile design systems delivered as self-contained HTML + CSS — a living component catalogue and a two-screen concept that you and your AI can both read, inspect, and build from.

plugins.name: mobile-design-system
plugins.description: Generate a brand-new mobile app's design system as self-contained HTML + CSS: a token layer + a living component catalogue (Dev Mode + Copy-as-prompt) + a two-screen concept — a shared interface for you and any agent. Framework-agnostic; greenfield only.
